Description: IAM policy that allows an EC2 instance to pull images from ECR. Attach this to the EC2 instance role (EC2ECRReadRole) so the deploy script works without hardcoded credentials on the server.

Step1_CreateRole.note: Creates the IAM role EC2 will assume

Step2_AttachPolicy.command: aws iam put-role-policy --role-name EC2ECRReadRole --policy-name EC2ECRReadAccess --policy-document file://scripts/ec2_ecr_policy.json
Step2_AttachPolicy.note: Attaches ECR read permissions to the role

Step3_CreateInstanceProfile.command: aws iam create-instance-profile --instance-profile-name EC2ECRReadRole && aws iam add-role-to-instance-profile --instance-profile-name EC2ECRReadRole --role-name EC2ECRReadRole
Step3_CreateInstanceProfile.note: Wraps the role in an instance profile so EC2 can use it

Step4_Verify.note: Confirms the profile exists before running deploy_aws.sh
